import MethodEndpoint from '@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint';

import RequestSchema from '@theme/RequestSchema';

import OperationTabs from '@theme/OperationTabs';
import TabItem from '@theme/TabItem';
import Heading from '@theme/Heading';
import Translate from '@docusaurus/Translate';

<Heading as={'h1'} className={'openapi__heading'} children={'Get /channels/{channelId}/events/{eventId}'}></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint method={'get'} path={'/api/v1/channels/{channelId}/events/{eventId}'} context={'endpoint'}></MethodEndpoint>

Get /channels/\{channelId\}/events/\{eventId\}

<Heading id={'request'} as={'h2'} className={'openapi-tabs__heading'}>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[
    { description: 'Identifier of the channel.', in: 'path', name: 'channelId', required: true, schema: { type: 'string' } },
    { description: 'Identifier of the event.', in: 'path', name: 'eventId', required: true, schema: { type: 'string' } },
  ]}
></ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema title={'Body'}></RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  responses={{
    '200': {
      content: {
        'application/json': {
          schema: {
            additionalProperties: false,
            properties: {
              createdAt: { description: 'Timestamp when the event was created, as an ISO 8601 datetime string.', type: 'string' },
              description: { description: 'Free-text description of the event.', type: 'string' },
              endDate: { description: 'Event end time, as an ISO 8601 datetime string.', type: 'string' },
              id: { description: 'Unique event identifier within the channel.', type: 'string' },
              name: { description: 'Human-readable display name for the event.', type: 'string' },
              startDate: { description: 'Event start time, as an ISO 8601 datetime string.', type: 'string' },
            },
            required: ['id', 'name', 'startDate', 'endDate', 'createdAt'],
            type: 'object',
          },
        },
      },
      description: 'Default Response',
    },
  }}
></StatusCodes>
